heading: Interface Endpoints
body:
To delete the AWS (Amazon Web Services) private endpoint interface you specify using the
Atlas CLI, run the following command:```sh

atlas privateEndpoints aws interfaces delete <interfaceEndpointId> [options]

```To learn more about the command syntax and parameters, see the
Atlas CLI documentation for [atlas privateEndpoints aws interfaces delete](atlas/cli/current/command/atlas-privateEndpoints-aws-interfaces-delete).**Ui:**Atlas UI* Click the Private Endpoint tab.

* Next to the private endpoint you want to remove, click
  Terminate.

* To confirm, click Confirm in the dialog box.**Azure Private Link:**Azure Private Link**Atlascli:**Atlas CLI
